---
title: "Ethics of Reuse"
format: html

previous:
  href: "Creator-Adapting, Revising, and Remixing.html"
  text: "Adapting, Revising, and Remixing"

next:
  href: "Creator-Quiz.html"
  text: "Quiz"
---

Responsible adaptation means:

-   preserving cultural meaning;
-   respecting author intent;
-   maintaining evidence quality and proper citation;
-   Ensuring modifications are transparent.

For further reading please see:

 @RN70201. Available at: https://pressbooks.pub/oenmodify/;\
 @RN70202. Available at: https://pressbooks.pub/authoropen/.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Creator-Quiz.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Quiz.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
